content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Market is in clear risk-on mode: Nifty +0.87%, Bank Nifty +1.39%, VIX down 6.7% to 17.53, Realty leading at +2.14%, and Q4 earnings season driving strong stock-specific moves. Breadth is healthy with multiple sectors participating. However, it's Day 2 of a 180-day experiment with zero deployment — prudent to build exposure gradually rather than chase extended gap-ups.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24350,
      "nifty_resistance": 24800
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "ICICIBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 65,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 1388.40,
      "stop_loss": 1352.00,
      "target": 1460.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "time_exit_plan": "If target not achieved within 10 trading days, exit at market regardless of price. If stock closes below 1352 on daily basis, exit next morning.",
      "reasoning": "Best-in-class large private bank with strong Q4: PAT Rs 13,702 cr beat estimates, advances +15.8% YoY, Net NPA 0.33% (best in class). Sector leader with Bank Nifty momentum. Entry near pivot R1 (1355) with resistance at 1400 cleared. Risk 2.6%, target gives 5.2% upside = 1:2 R:R. Moderate-size core position (~9% of capital) given high conviction."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 36,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 1379.90,
      "stop_loss": 1330.00,
      "target": 1475.00,
      "confidence": 0.68,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "time_exit_plan": "Exit at market if target not hit in 10 trading days. If stock gives up half the breakout gain (closes below 1330), exit.",
      "reasoning": "Blowout Q4 (best in 9 years): PAT +27% YoY, revenue +23% on volume-led growth, new 52-wk high breakout with strong volume. Defensive FMCG quality. Breakout from Rs 1300 resistance. Risk 3.6%, target 6.9% = 1:1.9 R:R. ~5% allocation given slightly extended gap-up entry."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 950,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 80.18,
      "stop_loss": 75.50,
      "target": 89.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "time_exit_plan": "Exit at market if 52-wk high breakout fails to extend within 10 trading days. If closes below 75.50, exit.",
      "reasoning": "PSU bank with strong Q4 business update (deposits +14%, advances +22%), 52-week high breakout at Rs 81.50 on 2.4x volume. Sector momentum intact. Risk 5.8%, target 11% = 1:1.9 R:R. Smaller allocation (~7.6%) given breakout is extended intraday."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 70,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 1037.90,
      "stop_loss": 995.00,
      "target": 1115.00,
      "confidence": 0.66,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "time_exit_plan": "Q4 results on April 25 (within 4 days) is the key catalyst. If results disappoint or stock closes below 995, exit. If target not hit within 7 days post-results, exit at market.",
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 business update: deposits +22.8%, advances +25.1%, plus structural re-rating from universal bank transition. Near 52-wk high. Q4 results April 25 = binary event. Risk 4.1%, target 7.4% = 1:1.8 R:R. ~7% allocation. Event-driven swing with tight timeline."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HDFCBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 was in-line but lagging ICICI significantly (NII +3.2% vs +2% but loan growth 12% vs 15.8%). Stock down 20% CYTD shows persistent underperformance. Bearish engulfing on Apr 16 in daily patterns. Prefer to deploy banking exposure via ICICI instead. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+7.98% close after +11% intraday high — already extended. Beat driven by provision write-backs (low quality earnings). Analyst sector caution. Pass on risk-reward; wait for pullback to Rs 920-940 zone."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "GROWW",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Strong fundamentals (PAT +122%) but stock up 43% in April alone, +9.13% today after gapping up. Extended and emotional. Limited price history (no 52-wk range). Prefer to watch for consolidation before entry."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ELECON",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT collapsed 96% YoY on goodwill impairment. FY26 PAT -18%. Rally today is sentiment-driven, not earnings-driven. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "BUY",
      "symbol": "ZENTEC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 30,
      "order_type": "LIMIT",
      "price": 1742.70,
      "stop_loss": 1648.00,
      "target": 1890.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "time_exit_plan": "Exit at market if target not hit in 8 trading days. Trail SL up if stock crosses 1820.",
      "reasoning": "Defence sector tailwind + fresh orders (Rs 332 cr anti-drone, Rs 120 cr MoD, cannon mfg licence). 3.5x volume surge = institutional interest. Today's candle ran 1648-1825 — volatile. Risk 5.4%, target 8.4% = 1:1.6 R:R. Smaller position (~5%) given rich sector valuations and small-cap risk."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "SOBHA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.48,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Realty sector strong but SOBHA is a laggard (-21% in 6 months vs sector rally). Q3 PAT -28.86%, revenue -22.95%. Prefer sector leaders (DLF, Oberoi) if playing realty theme. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "TATAELXSI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.40,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "FY26 PAT -20% YoY, revenue flat, premium 42x P/E with decelerating earnings. IT sector headwinds from US tariffs. Today's move is dividend-driven; fundamentals don't support chasing. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "KEC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.48,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Good orders but Axis forecasts Q4 EBITDA -32%, PAT -51%. Middle East exposure ~20%. Today printed bearish engulfing. Supertrend SELL. Conflicting signals — pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "BANKBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Getting banking exposure via ICICIBANK and AUBANK directly with better risk-reward. Avoiding double-exposure via ETF."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "NIFTYBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Single-stock positions I'm entering (ICICI, Nestle, MAHABANK, AUBANK, ZENTEC) already provide diversified market exposure. Reserve ETF for defensive allocations later."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [],
  "watchlist_notes": "GROWW — watch for pullback/consolidation below Rs 205 for re-entry given strong fundamentals. PNBHOUSING — wait for pullback to Rs 920-940. SOBHA — watch for earnings-driven move in May; Nuvama target Rs 1,631. TATAELXSI — wait for clear trough confirmation before engaging premium P/E name.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deploying ~34% of capital across 5 positions today (ICICI 9%, MAHABANK 7.6%, AUBANK 7.3%, NESTLE 5%, ZENTEC 5.2%). Leaves ~66% cash buffer — appropriate for Day 2 of experiment. Sector mix: Banking 24% (ICICI+MAHABANK+AUBANK — within 35% cap), FMCG 5%, Defence 5%. All positions with defined SL and targets, max hold 7-10 days aligned with experiment timeframe. If markets turn, total SL risk capped at ~INR 15,000 (~1.5% of portfolio) across all positions — well within daily loss limit."
}
